samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages. The output result is available on the result port, and the o_en = 1 indicates the availability of the result.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="PIPELINE_STAGES">3</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="i_en_reg" description="Register to store the input enable signal.">0</reg>
            <reg id="adda_reg" description="Register to store the input operand A.">0</reg>
            <reg id="addb_reg" description="Register to store the input operand B.">0</reg>
            <reg id="o_en_reg" description="Register to store the output enable signal.">0</reg>
            <reg id="carry" description="Register to store the carry value.">0</reg>
            <reg id="sum" description="Register to store the sum value.">0</reg>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <assign description="Pipeline stage logic to calculate the sum and carry values based on the input operands and carry from the previous stage.">
                for (int i = 0; i < PIPELINE_STAGES; i++) begin
                    if (i == 0) begin
                        sum[i] = adda[i] ^ addb[i] ^ carry;
                        carry = (adda[i] & addb[i]) | (adda[i] & carry) | (addb[i] & carry);
                    end else begin
                        sum[i] = adda[i] ^ addb[i] ^ carry;
                        carry = (adda[i] & addb[i]) | (adda[i] & carry) | (addb[i] & carry);
                    end
                end
            </assign>
        </combinational_logic>
        <always description="Always block to update the registers based on the clock and reset signals.">
            always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
                if (!rst_n) begin
                    i_en_reg <= 0;
                    adda_reg <= 0;
                    addb_reg <= 0;
                    o_en_reg <= 0;
                    carry <= 0;
                    sum <= 0;
                end else begin
                    i_en_reg <= i_en;
                    adda_reg <= adda;
                    addb_reg <= addb;
                    o_en_reg <= i_en_reg;
                    carry <= i_en_reg ? sum[PIPELINE_STAGES - 1] : carry;
                    sum <= i_en_reg ? sum[PIPELINE_STAGES - 1] : sum;
                end
            end
        </always>
        <assign description="Assign the output ports based on the registers.">
            result = {carry, sum};
            o_en = o_en_reg;
        </assign>
    </implementation>
</module>
